# Dagger of the Endless Void
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Dagger%20of%20the%20Endless%20Void&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Dagger of the Endless Void
| desc = Ths dagger was long lost,before it was found in some old,dark ruins of an cursed place. Wielders of this weapon will suffer,and then die. Thanks to: BeeEasy
| slot = dagger
| tier = UT
| rarity = l

| rof = 100
| shots = 2
| arcgap = 10
| range = 
| minDmg = 95
| maxDmg = 135
| projSpeed = 10
| lifetime = 500
| amplitude = 0.24
| frequency = 0.88
| fameb = 7
| feedp = 900

| legendary = 2

| lootbag = white
| dropsFrom = can be found in a White Bag dropped in: Sprite World from 1st and 2nd Boss.
|range2 = 5.5|effects = yes|multihit = yes}}

<noinclude>
{{NavDaggers}}
</noinclude><noinclude>
[[Category: Daggers]]</noinclude><noinclude>
[[Category:Tiered weapons]]</noinclude>
